findings.title: vllm-project/vllm
findings.description: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs

findings.title: meta-llama/llama-cookbook
findings.description: Welcome to the Llama Cookbook! This is your go to guide for Building with Llama: Getting started with Inference, Fine-Tuning, RAG. We also show you how to solve end to end problems using Llama model family and using them on various provider services

findings.title: GeeeekExplorer/nano-vllm
findings.description: Nano vLLM

findings.title: xorbitsai/inference
findings.description: Swap GPT for any LLM by changing a single line of code. Xinference lets you run open-source, speech, and multimodal models on cloud, on-prem, or your laptop — all through one unified, production-ready inference API.

findings.title: intel/ipex-llm
findings.description: Accelerate local LLM inference and finetuning (LLaMA, Mistral, ChatGLM, Qwen, DeepSeek, Mixtral, Gemma, Phi, MiniCPM, Qwen-VL, MiniCPM-V, etc.) on Intel XPU (e.g., local PC with iGPU and NPU, discrete GPU such as Arc, Flex and Max); seamlessly integrate with llama.cpp, Ollama, HuggingFace, LangChain, LlamaIndex, vLLM, DeepSpeed, Axolotl, etc.

findings.title: LMCache/LMCache
findings.description: Supercharge Your LLM with the Fastest KV Cache Layer

findings.title: kserve/kserve
findings.description: Standardized Distributed Generative and Predictive AI Inference Platform for Scalable, Multi-Framework Deployment on Kubernetes

findings.title: xlite-dev/Awesome-LLM-Inference
findings.description: 📚A curated list of Awesome LLM/VLM Inference Papers with Codes: Flash-Attention, Paged-Attention, WINT8/4, Parallelism, etc.🎉

findings.title: kvcache-ai/Mooncake
findings.description: Mooncake is the serving platform for Kimi, a leading LLM service provided by Moonshot AI.

findings.title: tencentmusic/cube-studio
findings.description: cube studio开源云原生一站式机器学习/深度学习/大模型AI平台，mlops算法链路全流程，算力租赁平台，notebook在线开发，拖拉拽任务流pipeline编排，多机多卡分布式训练，超参搜索，推理服务VGPU虚拟化，边缘计算，标注平台自动化标注，deepseek等大模型sft微调/奖励模型/强化学习训练，vllm/ollama/mindie大模型多机推理，私有知识库，AI模型市场，支持国产cpu/gpu/npu 昇腾生态，支持RDMA，支持pytorch/tf/mxnet/deepspeed/paddle/colossalai/horovod/ray/volcano等分布式

findings.title: gpustack/gpustack
findings.description: A GPU cluster manager that configures and orchestrates inference engines like vLLM and SGLang for high-performance AI model deployment.

findings.title: skyzh/tiny-llm
findings.description: A course of learning LLM inference serving on Apple Silicon for systems engineers: build a tiny vLLM + Qwen.

findings.title: vllm-project/vllm-omni
findings.description: A framework for efficient model inference with omni-modality models

findings.title: PaddlePaddle/FastDeploy
findings.description: High-performance Inference and Deployment Toolkit for LLMs and VLMs based on PaddlePaddle

findings.title: containers/ramalama
findings.description: RamaLama is an open-source developer tool that simplifies the local serving of AI models from any source and facilitates their use for inference in production, all through the familiar language of containers.

findings.title: NVIDIA/Model-Optimizer
findings.description: A unified library of SOTA model optimization techniques like quantization, pruning, distillation, speculative decoding, etc. It compresses deep learning models for downstream deployment frameworks like TensorRT-LLM, TensorRT, vLLM, etc. to optimize inference speed.

findings.title: vllm-project/vllm-ascend
findings.description: Community maintained hardware plugin for vLLM on Ascend

findings.title: kubeai-project/kubeai
findings.description: AI Inference Operator for Kubernetes. The easiest way to serve ML models in production. Supports VLMs, LLMs, embeddings, and speech-to-text.

findings.title: Ksuriuri/index-tts-vllm
findings.description: Added vLLM support to IndexTTS for faster inference.

findings.title: intel/auto-round
findings.description: SOTA rounding-based quantization for high-accuracy low-bit LLM inference, seamlessly optimized for CPU/XPU/CUDA, with multi-datatype support and full compatibility with vLLM, SGLang, and Transformers.
